name: Grilled Chicken in Olive Oil-Chive Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, combine 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar, 1/4 teaspoon each of dry mustard, salt, and pepper.
2. Process for 15 seconds.
3. Add an additional 2 tablespoons olive oil and process for 10 seconds.
4. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons white wine vinegar, 2 more tablespoons olive oil, garlic, and lemon peel. Process for about 15 seconds more.
5. Set aside to marinate in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours (or overnight).
6. Preheat grill and place chicken on it, skin side up, about 8 inches from the heat.
7. Sprinkle remaining salt and pepper over the chicken.
8. Grill, turning occasionally and basting with sauce every 10 minutes, until a fork can be easily inserted into the chicken, about 1 hour.
